evals.expected_output: Runs mix hex.outdated, applies safe updates, confirms before breaking changes, verifies compilation and tests, provides summary

assertions.text: Ran mix hex.outdated to assess dependency state before making changes
Classified dependencies as safe vs breaking
Applied safe updates via mix deps.update
Noted or presented breaking changes to the user before applying them
Provided a summary with version numbers

evals.prompt: I need to update my Elixir dependencies. Some might have breaking changes — check the changelogs and fix anything that breaks.
evals.expected_output: Runs mix hex.outdated, applies safe updates, looks up changelogs for breaking changes on hexdocs, applies code fixes, verifies each breaking update individually

assertions.text: Ran mix hex.outdated to assess dependency state
Classified dependencies as safe vs breaking
Applied safe updates via mix deps.update
Looked up changelogs on hexdocs.pm for breaking deps
Processed breaking changes one at a time with verification between each
Provided a summary with version numbers

evals.prompt: Run mix hex.outdated and tell me what needs updating, then go ahead and update everything
evals.expected_output: Presents outdated deps assessment first, classifies safe vs breaking, then proceeds with updates after showing the user what will change

assertions.text: Ran mix hex.outdated to assess dependency state
Presented the full assessment to the user before making changes
Classified dependencies as safe vs breaking
Applied safe updates via mix deps.update
Provided a summary with version numbers
